---
title: "Welcome Zakaria!"
meta:
  - name: description
    content: "News and updates from the Machine Learning for Materials Design (ML4MD) Lab: Welcome Zakaria!"
  - name: keywords
    content: "ML4MD Lab, News, Zakaria Elabid joins our group as a postdoctoral researcher."
description: "Zakaria Elabid joins our group as a postdoctoral researcher"
#author: "Attila Cangi"
date: "2025-11-01"
date-format: " "
image: welcome_vincent.jpeg # Ensure this image has appropriate alt text if used directly in content
draft: false
categories:
  - new staff
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

We are pleased to welcome Zakaria Elabid as a postdoctoral researcher! 

Zakaria recently obtained his PhD from the Sorbonne Center for Artificial Intelligence (SCAI) at Sorbonne University and has a background in AI, generative AI, and time-series forecasting, as well as industry experience with TotalEnergies.
